title: Purely Grilled Croatian Monkfish Skewers
description: Earthy and crisp monkfish skewers featuring Croatian flavors, grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill, this lacto-vegetarian-friendly dish is perfect for a monsoon evening.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, thyme, rosemary, salt, and black pepper.
Add the monkfish pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated monkfish pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Wrap each skewer in a sheet of papillote paper, making sure to seal the edges tightly.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 8 minutes, turning occasionally.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes.
Serve the monkfish skewers hot, garnished with additional thyme and rosemary if desired.
